trainingDataExport.purpose: claude-flow neural network training for failure prediction

trainingObjectives: Recommend TDD patterns for integration tasks

modelRecommendations.confidenceCalibration: Reduce confidence for character-level operations without explicit validation
modelRecommendations.tddSuggestions: Always recommend character-level and environment-specific tests
modelRecommendations.riskAssessment: Flag immediate cleanup operations and escaped string usage as high-risk

integrationInstructions.patternMatching: Monitor for fix-illusion signals in real-time during code generation
integrationInstructions.preventiveAction: Suggest additional testing when pattern probability exceeds 0.3
